compliance.title: 🇨🇭 BlueX Swiss Payroll & Social Security Compliance
compliance.summary: BlueX automatically manages Swiss tax compliance, VAT invoicing, and social security calculations for all completed bookings:

complianceItems.title: Old-Age & Disability Social Insurance
complianceItems.description: Calculated automatically for registered freelancers. Split evenly (5.3% provider / 5.3% platform/employer) on taxable payouts.

complianceItems.title: Unemployment Insurance
complianceItems.description: Applies to earnings up to CHF 148,200 per annum.

complianceItems.title: SUVA Accident Insurance
complianceItems.description: Every active booking conducted via BlueX includes mandatory Swiss occupational accident insurance coverage.

complianceItems.title: Swiss Value Added Tax (VAT)
complianceItems.description: Automated VAT receipts are issued to commercial clients upon payout release.

actionPoints: 🏛️ **Automatic Tax Receipts**: Download your monthly VAT & AHV breakdown directly from the Earnings dashboard.
💼 **Quellensteuer Integration**: Non-resident contractors in Border Zones (DE/FR/IT) are automatically processed via withholding tax.
